title: Deliciously Jammy Syrian Italian Sausage Curry
description: A post-workout Syrian dish featuring Italian fennel sausages in a jammy and creamy curry sauce, cooked in a kadhai and suitable for ovo-vegetarian diets. This recipe combines the flavors of Syria and Italy with a sweet and spicy lacquer-glaze.

ingredients.name: Italian fennel sausages
ingredients.notes: sweet Italian sausage with fennel seeds

instructions: Heat oil in a kadhai over medium heat and cook the Italian fennel sausages until browned on all sides.
Remove the sausages from the kadhai and set them aside.
Add more oil if necessary and saute the chopped onion until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the kadhai and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the curry powder and cumin powder and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the lacquer-glaze to the kadhai and stir to combine.
Return the sausages to the kadhai and cook until they are fully coated in the curry sauce.
Stir in the beaten egg and cook until the egg is fully incorporated.
Season the curry with salt to taste.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
